compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
advertise Titan's inclusive fit, no commas
response:
**TITAN: BIG FITS FOR BIG LIVES**

Titan makes clothes for men who demand more. No shrinking. No squeezing. Just bold style built for real size.

Our fits are roomy where it counts. Shoulders wide. Sleeves long. Waistbands stretch without sagging. No tight spots. No awkward gaps.

Quality fabrics move with you. Soft cotton breathes easy. Durable denim holds strong. Stitching stays put wash after wash.

Dress sharp for work. Stay comfy on weekends. Look good doing both. Titan has your back.

Big men deserve better. Titan delivers. Shop now and step into clothes that fit your life.
